adaptations: Admin resource naming now uses tigrbl_auth tenant semantics instead of source realm semantics.
Admin RPC discovery uses runtime rpc.discover first and falls back to the checked-in OpenRPC catalog.
Admin credentials are runtime/session supplied only; no Vite admin API-key value is embedded in built assets.
notes: Adapted React/Vite admin UIX source exists and passes frontend build/test checks. Runtime OpenRPC method binding is improved but remains partial because copied screens still gate unsupported admin mutations by discovered method availability.
